---
title: "Notes"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Method notes</span>

# Start with the overview, then drop into sources

This section collects the method notes and source-based reading pages that support the rest of the site. Use it to orient to a design, compare alternatives, and then move into specific source notes only when you need more detail.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>Method overviews</span>
  <span>Source notes</span>
  <span>Notes map</span>
</div>
:::

## Main Sections {#main-sections .section-heading}

<p class="section-intro">The section headers in the sidebar now serve as the overview pages for each method group.</p>

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-overview">Overview</span>

### [Matching](matching/matching-and-weighting.qmd)

Use this route for matching and weighting concepts, assumptions, diagnostics, and source-specific notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-overview">Overview</span>

### [Synthetic Control](scm/synthetic-control.qmd)

Use this route for synthetic-control concepts, teaching data, and source mapping.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-overview">Overview</span>

### [Other Methods](other-methods/index.qmd)

Use this route for difference-in-differences, regression discontinuity, and cross-method comparison.
:::
:::

## Notes Map {#notes-map .section-heading}

<p class="section-intro">Internal pages are limited to the Notes section. External nodes show the sources those notes link to.</p>


```{=html}
<div id="link-graph-shell" class="link-graph-shell graph-section" data-graph-src="../data/notes_link_graph_payload.json">
  <div class="link-graph-controls" role="group" aria-label="Link graph controls">
    <label class="link-graph-search" for="link-graph-search">
      <span class="link-graph-control-label">Find node</span>
      <input id="link-graph-search" type="search" placeholder="Search by label or path" list="link-graph-node-options" />
    </label>
    <label class="link-graph-toggle" for="toggle-internal">
      <input id="toggle-internal" type="checkbox" checked />
      <span>Notes pages</span>
    </label>
    <label class="link-graph-toggle" for="toggle-external">
      <input id="toggle-external" type="checkbox" checked />
      <span>External sources</span>
    </label>
    <button id="reset-link-graph" class="link-graph-button link-graph-button-secondary" type="button">Reset view</button>
    <datalist id="link-graph-node-options"></datalist>
  </div>
  <div class="link-graph-legend">
    <span class="link-graph-legend-item link-graph-legend-item-internal"><span class="kind-pill internal">internal</span> Notes pages</span>
    <span class="link-graph-legend-item link-graph-legend-item-external"><span class="kind-pill external">external</span> Linked external sources</span>
    <span class="link-graph-legend-note">Hover or click a node to highlight its links, then drag to reposition or scroll to zoom.</span>
  </div>
  <div id="link-graph-root" class="link-graph-root">
    <div class="link-graph-canvas-wrap">
      <div id="link-graph-svg" class="link-graph-svg" role="img" aria-label="Interactive Notes section map"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="../assets/vendor/d3.min.js"></script>
<script src="../assets/js/link_network.js"></script>
```

</div>
